title: astragalus anserinus
intro: Astragalus anserinus, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus anserinus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus anserinus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, capsules, and teas, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent diseases.
